email.footer: You received this email from hallismiley.is. If you did not request this, you can safely ignore it.
email.verify.subject: Verify your Halli Smiley account
email.verify.heading: Verify your email
email.verify.body: Thanks for signing up! Click the button below to verify your email address and activate your account. This link expires in 24 hours.
email.verify.fallback: Or paste this link into your browser:
email.reset.subject: Reset your Halli Smiley password
email.reset.heading: Reset your password
email.reset.body: We received a request to reset the password for your account. Click the button below to choose a new password. This link expires in 1 hour.
email.reset.fallback: Or paste this link into your browser:
email.reset.noAction: If you did not request a password reset, no action is needed — your password remains unchanged.
email.order.subject: Your Halli Smiley order {orderNumber}
email.order.heading: Thank you for your order
email.order.body: Your order {orderNumber} has been received. A confirmation of the full details is below.
email.order.questions: Questions? Reply to this email and we'll get back to you.
email.rsvpConfirmation.subject.new: Your RSVP to Halli's 40th — we've got it!
email.rsvpConfirmation.body.new: Hi {name} — thanks for letting Halli know you'll be there. Here's a copy of your answers:
email.rsvpConfirmation.body.update: Hi {name} — your updated answers are saved. Here's what we have:
email.rsvpConfirmation.updateNote: Need to change anything? You can update your RSVP any time:
email.rsvpConfirmation.closing: Can't wait to celebrate with you!
